title: JOB VACANCY-POSITION OF HUMAN RESOURCE MANAGER
html:
A) JOB VACANCY ADVERTISEMENT
  • - Position: Human Resource Manager
  • - Company: G3 Biz Ltd
  • - Location: Mile 2 Limbe, South West Region
B) About G3 Biz Ltd
G3 Biz Ltd is a reputable distribution company that represents Guinness Cameroun in Limbe. The company is primarily engaged in the distribution and marketing of Guinness Cameroon products, offering internship programs to undergraduates, and providing business consultancy services. Its vision is to establish G3 Biz Ltd as the most reputable company in Cameroon in terms of trust, expansion, value creation and value sharing. It has a dedicated workforce of 40 permanent staff.
C) Strategic Role Objective of Human Resource Manager
  • - The Human Resource Manager will play a pivotal role in achieving the company’s vision by ensuring that the company attracts, develops, and retains a highly motivated and competent workforce.
D) Some Specific Role Responsibilities of the HR Manager:
  • - Develop and implement HR strategies aligned with the company’s overall strategic goals and vision.
  • - Promote a positive organizational culture that fosters productivity, teamwork, and continuous improvement.
  • - Strengthen employee relations and ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.
  • - Drive performance management and capacity-building initiatives to enhance staff efficiency.
  • - Support management in strategic workforce planning and talent development
E) Qualifications and Requirements
  • - Bachelor’s in HR Management, or in Business Management, or in the equivavent.
  • - Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in a similar HR leadership role.
  • - Strong knowledge of labor laws and human resource best practices.
  • - Excellent interpersonal, communication, and leadership skills.
  • - Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR management software.
  • - Demonstrated ability to work independently and in a team-oriented environment.
F) How to Apply
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter addressed to: The Managing Director G3 Biz Ltd, Limbe. Website address: www.g3-bizltd.com Website email: info@g3-bizltd.com Or drop your hard copy directly to the depot manager. 
"Deadline to submit application: 21st October 2025"
text:
A) JOB VACANCY ADVERTISEMENT



 - Position: Human Resource Manager

 - Company: G3 Biz Ltd

 - Location: Mile 2 Limbe, South West Region


B) About G3 Biz Ltd


G3 Biz Ltd is a reputable distribution company that represents Guinness Cameroun in Limbe. The company is primarily engaged in the distribution and marketing of Guinness Cameroon products, offering internship programs to undergraduates, and providing business consultancy services. Its vision is to establish G3 Biz Ltd as the most reputable company in Cameroon in terms of trust, expansion, value creation and value sharing. It has a dedicated workforce of 40 permanent staff.
C) Strategic Role Objective of Human Resource Manager



 - The Human Resource Manager will play a pivotal role in achieving the company’s vision by ensuring that the company attracts, develops, and retains a highly motivated and competent workforce.


D) Some Specific Role Responsibilities of the HR Manager:



 - Develop and implement HR strategies aligned with the company’s overall strategic goals and vision.

 - Promote a positive organizational culture that fosters productivity, teamwork, and continuous improvement.

 - Strengthen employee relations and ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.

 - Drive performance management and capacity-building initiatives to enhance staff efficiency.

 - Support management in strategic workforce planning and talent development


E) Qualifications and Requirements



 - Bachelor’s in HR Management, or in Business Management, or in the equivavent.

 - Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in a similar HR leadership role.

 - Strong knowledge of labor laws and human resource best practices.

 - Excellent interpersonal, communication, and leadership skills.

 - Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR management software.

 - Demonstrated ability to work independently and in a team-oriented environment.


F) How to Apply


Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter addressed to:
The Managing Director
G3 Biz Ltd, Limbe.
Website address: www.g3-bizltd.com
Website email: info@g3-bizltd.com
Or drop your hard copy directly to the depot manager.
"Deadline to submit application: 21st October 2025"
